etimesSkip the market: ‘Rent’ a mango tree and enjoy 90kg of mangoes this summerA new service allows people to lease a mango tree for a season. Customers can choose a tree online and receive its full harvest, up to 90 kilograms. Farmers manage the trees and fruit. This model connects urban consumers with fresh produce and offers farmers stable income. It promotes sustainable farming and redefines food ownership.

etimesWho is Sina Ruppenthal? Strongwoman who lifted and threw 10 men in 37.44 seconds sets Guinness World RecordGerman strongwoman Sina Ruppenthal has shattered a Guinness World Record, lifting and throwing ten men in an astonishing 37.44 seconds. This feat, showcased on a German TV show, highlights not just raw power but also incredible technique and stamina. The impressive display has captivated online audiences, with viewers praising the athletes' dedication and Ruppenthal's remarkable strength.

etimesWatch here: Robot goes rogue, smashes plates, then breaks into ‘dance’ as staff struggle to stop itA restaurant robot went rogue in a viral video. The machine began knocking over plates, flailing its arms uncontrollably. Staff struggled to stop it as customers watched. The incident has generated amusement and concern online regarding robot safety. Many are discussing the need for emergency stop mechanisms on such devices.
